name: opennori
description: Repo-native Plan, Implement, Verify, and Finish workflow with outcome-driven completion.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-native agent workflow with outcome-driven completion.
interface.longDescription: OpenNori gives Codex a durable, command-ready project workflow: approve a bounded Nori Contract and Git delivery plan, implement from curated context, independently prove Outcomes with shell-free command execution and typed Evidence, verify the delivered commit or pull request, then preserve learning and finalize a clean archived checkpoint. Compact status and selective context loading keep agent turns bounded, while preview-first upgrades, hooks, and read-only project history preserve continuity without becoming project truth.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenNori for a new goal. Ask me for the goal before creating a Task.
